title: Legal / formal prose
description: Contract-style language — long sentences, formal tone
text: Subject to the terms and conditions set forth in this Agreement, the Provider hereby grants to the Customer a non-exclusive, non-transferable, revocable license to access and use the Service solely for internal business purposes, during the term of this Agreement and in accordance with the documentation provided.
tips: Legal/contract prose has its own rhythm — extra-long sentences
Words like "hereinafter" become single units — don't slow down
Lawyers, paralegals, and contracts teams type this all day

character_tips.anna: Legal English is formal but rhythmic. Most legal writers cap at 60 WPM.
character_tips.maxim: If you can type contracts at 85 WPM, you're faster than 99% of paralegals.
character_tips.knopych: LEGAL EAGLE! ⚖️ Long sentences, no fear!
character_tips.klavochka: Careful and dignified, my dear — like a proper document 📜
